en: Learn English with fun facts, perfect for beginners.
ko: 재미있는 사실로 영어를 배우세요, 초보자에게 딱이에요.

en: Penguins live in very cold places like Antarctica.
ko: 펭귄은 남극 같은 매우 추운 곳에 살아요.

en: The wind there is very strong and very cold.
ko: 거기의 바람은 매우 강하고 매우 차가워요.

en: To stay warm, penguins stand very close together.
ko: 따뜻하게 지내기 위해 펭귄들은 아주 가까이 서요.

en: This big group is called a huddle.
Penguins on the outside feel the cold first.
Slowly they move toward the middle.
Penguins in the middle become warmer and rest.
Then they move out again to help others.
ko: 그런 다음 다시 나가서 다른 펭귄을 도와줘요.

en: This way everyone gets a warm place.
ko: 이렇게 모두가 따뜻한 자리를 갖게 돼요.

en: It is teamwork that helps penguins survive winter.
Would you huddle with others to stay warm?
